## 📋 HOW THIS WORKS

**Auto-Capture Rules:**
- When Nick says "I need [item]" or "Get [item] from [store]" → Auto-add to this list
- When Nick says "Add to shopping list: [item]" → Auto-add
- When Nick checks off or says "Got [item]" → Move to COMPLETED.md

**Manual Add:**
- Edit this file directly in Obsidian
- Use format: `- [ ] [Item] — [purpose/location] #Project #Trade`
